assertions.notes: When the card catalog is populated (test-data.sql has 20 set_cards), DeckList resolves card names from metadata. When the catalog is empty, getCardName() falls back to 'Unknown Card {id}' and the element renders with data-testid='unknown-card'. This assertion catches the 'Unknown Card' regression: if set_cards is empty (failed ingest), every card in the deck shows 'Unknown Card'. The seeded DSK deck (deck-004) has 5 card types that exist in test-data.sql.
